components.text:
Hi {{1}},

Book your Tatkal train tickets easily through our app 🚆

1️⃣ Download our app from Play Store:

2️⃣ Open the app and click “Book Ticket”

3️⃣ Fill in your journey details and submit

Our team will review your request and share booking details shortly.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Your ticket has been successfully booked ✅

We’d appreciate your feedback on our service.
Please click the link below to leave a review.

Your feedback helps us improve and serve you better.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Thank you for applying to Anand Travel Agency.
We have received your application and will review it shortly.
We'll get back to you soon.

— Team Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Thank you for applying for visa services with us.
Our team will review your details and guide you through the next steps.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Your bus ticket request has been received successfully.
We are processing your booking and will update you soon.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Thank you for submitting your flight booking request.
Our team is checking the best available options for you.
We'll contact you shortly with details.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Your booking request has been cancelled as you are not responding to us.
If you need any further assistance, feel free to contact us.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hello {{1}},

This is a quick update regarding your booking.

Payment received successfully ✅
Your booking is now being processed.
We will update you once it is completed.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Your booking is ready for confirmation.
Please complete the payment to proceed further.
If you want to cancel your slot, please let us know.
Contact us if you need assistance.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

⚠️ Ticket Booking Failed

Due to heavy load on the IRCTC website, your ticket could not be booked. This rarely happens.

📅 Would you like us to try for the next available date?
or
💰 If you prefer a refund, please send your PhonePe number and name.

— Anand Travel Agency

Hi {{1}},

Thank you for sharing your journey details.
Your slot has been successfully registered.
Our team will contact you one day before your journey for Tatkal booking.

— Anand Travel Agency
Welcome and congratulations!! This message demonstrates your ability to send a WhatsApp message notification from the Cloud API, hosted by Meta. Thank you for taking the time to test with us.
